package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesNewreaderOnStringConversion() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_newreader_on_string_conversion"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.NewReader([]byte(s))` instead of `strings.NewReader(s)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
